text: This place is really nice if u want to get away without going far. Nature lovers will enjoy a stroll thru this serene "  forest in the hood ". I'm taken away every time I go.. And quickly brought back to reality when I leave - since the projects are right down the street. Don't worry though ( u scardy cats ) no one will mess with you.  Cool place tho- check it out.
